creator: ali.abdallah@suse.com
text:
On my Thinkpad T480, equipped with an intel 8265 wireless device, iwm fails to associate with some access points. 

wlan0: Trying to associate with f8:d1:11:24:a5:28 (SSID='Corporate' freq=2452 MHz)
iwm0: frame 1/148 b800002c UNHANDLED (this should not happen)
iwm0: dumping device error log

The access point caps are the following:
Corporate       f8:d1:11:24:a5:28    9   54M  -39:-96   100 EPS  RSN WME HTCAP ATH
